pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 11 (ensure_mailbox_exists "Sales") and export_result.sh hardcoded checks
setup_task.sh line 17 (DELETE FROM folders WHERE name = 'Invoices') and export_result.sh line 13 (TARGET_FOLDER_NAME="Invoices")
setup_task.sh line 20 (SUBJECT="Invoice #2023-998 for December Consultation") and export_result.sh line 12 (TARGET_SUBJECT="Invoice #2023-998 for December Consultation")

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a FreeScout email system with synthetic test data. The mailbox is named 'Sales' and will have a custom folder created named 'Invoices'. The target conversation has subject 'Invoice #2023-998 for December Consultation' and is created with synthetic customer email sarah.jenkins@example.com. All three metadata values (mailbox_name, folder_name, target_subject) are hardcoded in the setup and export scripts and match exactly with the task.json metadata claims.
